title: About DIG
text:
We are an interdisciplinary research group that uses computational and humanistic methods to study and practice restorative/transformative data science.

Principal Investigator

Nikko Stevens
If you’d like to join the lab, we’re currently recruiting student researchers.

title: Student Research Openings
text:
We are currently recruiting undergraduate student researchers!
Reach out if you’re interested in our current research and have any of the following skills or interests:

programming / computer science major
data science / SDS or math major
translation / Spanish major
visual designer / art major
writing / English major

Email Nikko with your CV.

title: Active Research Projects
text:
Fall 2025: We’re for all of these projects. Find out more







Liberatory AI Think Tank
Founded by Nikko Stevens and Catherine D’Ignazio (MIT), the Liberatory AI Think Tank is a collective of over 40 researchers studying ways of making with and about AI outside of corporate capture.


Carceral Technology History
We are producing a deeply researched inventory of key forms of carceral technology developed in the United States over the last 70 years


Restorative and Transformative Data Science: Case Studies
Through interviews with local activists and policy makers, we are studying the possibilities of activist data science in local municipalities

title: Work With Us
text:
Community Organizations
If you are a community organization or non-profit and you’d like to partner with us, please reach out. We are always looking for ways to support community organizations through research, policy support, and restorative/transformative data science.


Student Researchers
If you’re a current or incoming Smith student, please reach out to learn about working with us. We’re especially interested in students with the following interests / majors.

programming / computer science major
data science / SDS or math major
translation / Spanish major
visual designer or cartoonist / art major
writing / English major

Email Nikko with your CV.
